relatedBlades.title: Cloudflare for iGaming
relatedBlades.subtitle: Bring in more players with better performance, personalization, and protection
relatedBlades.copy: iGaming platforms that rely on a mix of point solutions for performance and security find they have difficulty scaling up to their desired global audience. Cloudflare offers a unified platform that enables iGaming platforms to securely serve players all over the world, helping gambling platforms maximize SEO, increase conversions, and protect their players' data.

relatedBlades.title: Bring in more players and keep them secure

columnContent.title: Maximize SEO globally
columnContent.description: iGaming affiliates and operators need simple ways to boost website speed and SEO. With data centers in %{CountryCount} countries, Cloudflare's network ensures your sites stay consistently fast worldwide.

columnContent.title: Personalize content to boost conversion
columnContent.description: Cloudflare's platform streamlines the management of thousands of websites at the edge, allowing you to quickly determine which content drives better conversion rates without extensive A/B testing.

columnContent.title: Unified security
columnContent.description: Cloudflare combines web application security, DDoS mitigation, and Zero Trust policies to keep your websites online, protect data, and ensure safe player experiences, providing comprehensive reliability.

relatedBlades.heading: How Cloudflare delivers security and performance for iGaming

content.value: Cloudflare's connectivity cloud identifies and mitigates attack traffic from any of its %{DataCenterCount}+ locations, meaning attacks are stopped with no impact on performance.
Gambling sites and iGaming platforms are often vulnerable to DDoS attacks. iGaming platforms that use custom TCP and UDP communication protocols require even more resources to prevent such attacks.
Protect the uptime, performance, and integrity of your game servers with Cloudflare.

related_asset.title: Cloudflare for Gaming - How we do it - Tab 1 - Illustration

content.value: Cloudflare's connectivity cloud interconnects with %{NetworkInterconnects} networks all over the world, minimizing the number of network hops between your content and your players.
Players are likely to be distributed around the world, and servers may be geographically distant from players, resulting in slow loading times and high ping times.
Cloudflare's globally distributed network spans over %{DataCenterCount} cities, ensuring proximity to players and lightning-fast responsiveness.
The Cloudflare connectivity cloud provides a single-plane platform to manage thousands of websites efficiently on the edge.
Analyze network, application, and security service logs to gain insights into how to improve your players' security and performance.
Use granular caching rules to optimize content for the user's language and location.
Get Internet insights, threats and trends based on aggregated Cloudflare network data.

relatedBlades.title: Learn how to secure your networks against advanced DDoS attacks

buttonOne.elementName: iGaming - Learn how to secure your networks against advanced DDoS attacks  - CTA

columnContent.title: Improve search rankings
columnContent.description: Top three search results capture over two-thirds of traffic, so securing one is crucial. Website speed is key for rankings. Cloudflare's CDN caching and network optimizations keep your sites fast globally, helping secure top positions.

columnContent.title: Increase conversion rates
columnContent.description: To optimize conversions, testing variables like countries, languages, styles, and placements is key. Cloudflare's S4S and Developer Platform simplify testing across affiliate sites, letting you manage everything through a single interface, streamlining your workflow.

columnContent.title: Secure your websites
columnContent.description: DDoS attacks and click fraud are major threats for iGaming sites and affiliates. Cloudflare protects your site against these threats, ensuring you stay online and maintain your organic search rankings.

relatedBlades.htmlContent: Flutter entertainment cuts malicious traffic by 90% and saves over £2 million annually with Cloudflare Bot Management

content.value:
Flutter Entertainment is a holding company of many online gaming companies - responsible for the Paddy Power and Betfair brands.

Flutter faced a very extensive credential-stuffing attack, during which 70-90% of all their traffic was classified as malicious. After using Cloudflare Bot Management, they managed to drive down, in certain situations, up to 90% the rate of these events, which resulted in huge savings (more than £2 million per year).
"Cloudflare is the biggest and most cost-effective security upgrade that you can take in the shortest period of time."
